disclaimer: Real sourced pricing pulled from CMS fee schedules and vendor/list prices via web research. Codes and rates are approximate and time-sensitive; verify against the current CMS CLFS/PFS and the clinic's actual negotiated costs before use. This is the cost-axis source of truth (artifact #1); it must be matched by depth in the findings/action model or most tests score zero.
